title: Translating Text
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a simple translation of a given sentence (e.g., 'Hello, how are you?') from one language (e.g., English) to another (e.g., Spanish).
constraints: Must use the target language vocabulary
Must preserve the original sentence structure

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated translation adheres to the language and structure constraints.
Evaluate if the generated translation is accurate.
Check if the generated translation uses the target language vocabulary.
